name: snapshot-governance-extension
description: Chrome extension for Snapshot governance voting with Web3Modal wallet connection

scripts.build: esbuild src/popup.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/popup.js --platform=browser --target=chrome100 && esbuild src/background.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/background.js --platform=browser --target=chrome100 && cp manifest.json dist/ && cp -r popup dist/ && cp -r recorder dist/ && cp -r signer dist/ && cp -r sign-vote dist/ && cp -r icons dist/
